title: ornithogalum notatum
intro: Ornithogalum notatum, also known as the Star of Bethlehem, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum notatum include its ability to reduce anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
